name: openai-voice-labs
description: Independent, production-minded workshops for building voice experiences with OpenAI.

scripts.docs:check: npm run docs:generated && npm run docs:links
scripts.install:labs: npm ci --prefix labs/lab-01-text-to-speech && npm ci --prefix labs/lab-02-realtime-voice-agent
scripts.check: npm run docs:check && npm run check:lab01 && npm run check:lab02
